description_long: This is a large, cylindrical concrete planter with a rough, matte surface and a wide open top filled with soil and mulch. The exterior of the pot is painted a muted green and features a decorative mural of white wolves walking on a yellow ground, set against a backdrop of dark green trees. The planter sits atop a base made of irregularly arranged stone or concrete blocks, elevating it slightly above the ground. The rim of the pot is thick and slightly weathered, suggesting outdoor use. No plant is currently growing in the soil, and there are no visible drainage holes or plant labels attached.
description: A large, cylindrical concrete planter with a painted mural of white wolves and filled with soil, sitting on a stone block base.
description_view_0: The front of the planter shows a single white wolf on a yellow patch, with the mural and rough green surface clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side displays multiple white wolves walking in a line, with the mural and yellow ground most prominent.
description_view_2: The mural continues with more wolves visible, and the stone block base is clearly seen.
description_view_3: The back of the planter is plain green with no mural or decoration, and the stone base is partially visible.
attribute_pot_decoration: painted mural of white wolves and trees on a green background
